evals.prompt: Run the quality gate on my changes before I commit.
evals.expected_output: Detects changed files via git diff, groups by package, runs lint + typecheck + tests per package, and reports pass/fail with specific errors.

expectations.name: detects-changed-files
expectations.assertion: Output shows git diff command execution and lists the specific changed TypeScript files

expectations.name: groups-by-package
expectations.assertion: Changed files are grouped by their Turborepo package (e.g., @mylife/budget, @mylife/ui)

expectations.name: reports-per-gate-status
expectations.assertion: Output includes separate PASS or FAIL status for lint, typecheck, and tests per package

evals.prompt: I changed some budget engine code. Check if it's safe to merge.
evals.expected_output: Focuses on the budget module, runs function gate, reports results with specific function-level analysis.

expectations.name: scopes-to-budget
expectations.assertion: Gate execution focuses on the budget module package rather than running across all packages

expectations.name: provides-actionable-output
expectations.assertion: If failures occur, output includes file:line references and suggested fixes rather than just PASS/FAIL
